feat.name: Musical Summons
feat.text: Your studies have given you a deeper understanding of animals and beasts, allowing you to call them to your side as you cast your spell. You cast *summon animal* and a one-action composition spell.

traits.name: Bard
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the bard class.
